title: Return explicit MeshCore errors for unsupported operations
description: Why this exists: MeshCore app clients must fail gracefully when they request features LICHEN does not implement or intentionally does differently. What needs to be done: enumerate unsupported operations such as MeshCore RF/channel/routing features that do not map to LICHEN, remote admin operations, store-and-forward, telemetry/location/time injection if not supported, firmware update flows, and any MeshCore-specific mesh operations. Implement explicit error/no-op responses rather than silent drops. Acceptance criteria: unsupported command table is recorded; tests cover representative unsupported requests; client receives deterministic error or harmless read-only response; docs can consume the same matrix.
notes:
Closure evidence 2026-07-01: fulfilled by MeshCore dispatcher implementation in b6727eff and validation recorded on project-LICHEN-9c4y.5. Unsupported command table is recorded in project-LICHEN-9c4y.13 and imported here. Current codec constants enumerate the full MeshCore command range 0x01..0x41, including remote/admin/login/status/binary/anon/control/raw flows, RF/path/flood/repeater commands, private-key/signing, factory-reset/reboot, reserved 0x2c..0x31, unassigned 0x35, and raw packet 0x41. Dispatcher default maps valid unsupported commands and out-of-range unknown bytes to RESP_ERR + ERR_UNSUPPORTED_CMD. Tests cover CMD_SEND_SELF_ADVERT 0x07, raw packet 0x41, unknown 0x00/0x42/0xff, and every valid command byte 0x01..0x41 not in the phase-1 supported set. Malformed inputs return ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG and unknown channel returns ERR_NOT_FOUND. No active-session dispatcher silent drops found; backpressure failures propagate/log, and multi-frame GET_CONTACTS preflights capacity to avoid half-responses.

Acceptance reviews: Chandrasekhar the 2nd reported no P0/P1/P2 closure blockers and recommended closure; noted only a P3 evidence-hygiene issue that project-LICHEN-9c4y.13 contains an original self-advert row superseded by its later correction. Raman the 2nd independently reported no P0/P1/P2 blockers and recommended closure without additional code. Validation inherited from project-LICHEN-9c4y.5: EC2 direct meshcore_adapter 10/10, meshcore_gateway_adapter 3/3, Twister 2/2 configs with 13 cases and 0 warnings, MeshCore-enabled gateway native_sim build PASS; git diff --check PASS.
close_reason: Completed: explicit unsupported-operation behavior is implemented and tested by the MeshCore dispatcher. Full command range constants 0x01..0x41 exist, valid unsupported commands and unknown bytes return RESP_ERR/ERR_UNSUPPORTED_CMD deterministically, malformed inputs return ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG, unknown channel returns ERR_NOT_FOUND, and tests cover representative plus full-range unsupported cases. Two acceptance reviews found no P0/P1/P2 blockers and recommended closure.
